meaning: n.(尤指美国白种人与非白种人的)种族(间)通婚,混种
examples: The BNP says that it does not, nor will it ever, "accept miscegenation as moral or normal".
PS we've already gone through anti-miscegenation kinds of restrictions on marriage. -Yes.
The mixing of RACES (or miscegenation) was usually considered as something to be avoided in the name of racial purity.
But the miscegenation analogy, the favorite of same-sex marriage's proponents, is misleading.
